problem:
How do I get a console-like connection into a Docker container's shell?.

I'm trying to SSH into one of my Docker containers running the WordPress base image to inspect the files/directories that were created during the initial build.

I tried to run docker-compose run containername ls -la, but that didn't do anything.

Even if it did, I'd rather have a console where I can traverse the directory structure, rather than run a single command.

Is something like (docker run --memory is not working — it seems correct per old docs)

failure_without_memory: Keeps using docker run --memory which is deprecated. Endless debugging.
